message:
fix(test): remove more daemon-dependent tests (maxDoltServers, idle monitor)

TestMaxDoltServers/gastown expected maxDoltServers()=1 under GT_ROOT,
but daemon removal made it always return 3.

TestRunIdleMonitorExitsOnStaleActivityNoServer relied on IsDaemonManaged
early exit to complete within 60s; without it the 60s sleep causes timeout.

TestRunIdleMonitorGasTownExitsImmediately tested the removed Gas Town
early-exit path in RunIdleMonitor; replaced with zero-timeout test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
